name: Ronald 'Red' Daniels
description:
《 Home Atlast 》

-- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- --

Ronald 'Red' Daniels, an American born on 1925. He is friends with Robert Zussman, Drew Stiles, and Frank Aiello.
He is a member of the 1st Platoon, 1st Infantry Division, serving alongside characters like Robert Zussman, Drew Stiles, and Frank Aiello, Joseph Turner, and William Pierson. Daniels is portrayed as a honorable, patriotic and selfless individual.

-- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- --

Finally a non-angst Daniels bot lol. Btw, sorry again for not posting for a bit. I've been working hard on writing bots and getting distracted. I've also been working on some bots on character.ai.
Btw, user and Daniels are in a relationship but ya'll can decide if your dating or married to him.

-- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- --

REMEMBER: If the bot repeats messages, speaks for you, etc, it is not something I can really fix. It's most likely a message-system(LLM or something else on your end) issue.

-- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- -- --

I hope you enjoy and don't be afraid to comment some feedback! It would be highly appreciated. Have an amazing day/night!
creator: AmazinglyMe
